strengths: The memo arrives with immediate suspicion, which keeps the chapter intelligent instead of convenient.

The chapter connects current and old-case responsibility templates while preserving the long-arc mystery.
The board-hearing hook cleanly raises institutional pressure for chapter 10.
issues: The chapter carries many document codes; chapter 10 should translate the evidence into a public procedural confrontation.
